prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约868→872→781→1056→716，近5年波动较大，2024年曾后移至1056名，2025年大幅前移至716名，为近5年最佳，但存在回归均值压力；本省物理类计划2021年87人、2022年94人、2023年94人、2024年94人、2025年67人；2026年计划69人，较2025年小幅扩招约3%，扩招幅度有限，对竞争 格局影响不大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜第6名（2026年），稳居全国顶尖高校行列，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面（ 食堂管理争议），但抖音热度排名第17（高热），综合热度约295万，短视频曝光量大，报考关注度仍高；历史投档异常信号为中关注（2022年专业组投档线差异），未见明显断 档；拥有中国语言文学A+、计算机科学与技术A+、物理学A+、天文学A+、工商管理A+等26个A-及以上学科，学科实力顶尖，对优质生源吸引力持续强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业2024年热度仍为推荐/高热推荐，与南大优势学科高度匹配；本省2026年物理类考生约45.6万人，较2025年增加约3.6%，竞争略 有加剧，2025年本科批436分，近年基本稳定；南京大学位于江苏，在广东省招生占比约3–4%（2025年约114人），跨省报考热度稳定，无明显 地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次716为近5年最佳（存在回调压力）、2026年计划小幅扩招约3%、本省物理类考生增加约3.6%以及学校声誉偏负面等因素，预计20 26年最低位次较2025年略有后移；预测最低位次约743名，区间654–832名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 人工智能（至诚班/普通班）
- 理科试验班（匡亚明学院大理科班）
- 计算机科学与技术（含计算机金融实验班）。

- 软件工程（含软工经济创新班）

- 天文学（应天实验室至诚班）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间654–832名内，建议以二档为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如650名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业（人工智能、匡亚明学 院大理科班）；位次接近区间上限（如830名附近）应以三档保底为主，谨慎冲刺。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 868 → 872 → 781 → 1056 → 716. In the past five years, there has been significant fluctuation. In 2024, the ranking moved back to 1056, but in 2025, it moved forward significantly to 716, the best in five years, though there is pressure to revert to the mean. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 87 in 2021, 94 in 2022, 94 in 2023, 94 in 2024, and 67 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 69, a slight expansion of about 3% compared to 2025, with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 6th on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), firmly among the top universities nationwide, with strong appeal to high-scoring candidates. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative (cafeteria management controversy), but Douyin popularity ranks 17th (high heat), with comprehensive heat around 2.95 million, high short video exposure, and still high application attention. Historical abnormal signals in admissions are medium concern (differences in 2022 major group admission lines), with no obvious gaps. It has 26 A- or above disciplines including Chinese Language and Literature A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Physics A+, Astronomy A+, Business Administration A+, etc., with top-tier disciplinary strength, maintaining strong attraction for high-quality students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication majors remains recommended/highly recommended, highly matching Nanjing University's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in the province is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% compared to 2025, with slightly intensified competition. The 2025 undergraduate batch line is 436 points, stable in recent years. Nanjing University is located in Jiangsu, with about 3–4% of its enrollment in Guangdong (about 114 in 2025), cross-province application heat is stable, with no obvious regional preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2025 ranking of 716 is the best in five years (with correction pressure), the 2026 plan slightly expands by about 3%, the number of Physics Category candidates in the province increases by about 3.6%, and the school's reputation is slightly negative, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move back compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 743, with a range of 654–832.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Artificial Intelligence (Zhicheng Class/Regular Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Kuang Yaming College Big Science Class)
- Computer Science and Technology (including Computer Finance Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information Class
- Software Engineering (including Software Engineering Economics Innovation Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematical and Physical Sciences)
- Astronomy (Yingtian Laboratory Zhicheng Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Chemistry and Life Sciences)
- Industrial Engineering (Intelligent System Integration Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 654–832, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 650), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors (Artificial Intelligence, Kuang Yaming College Big Science Class). If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 830), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety and be cautious with stretch applications.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 189 → 194 → 196 → 256 → 223, fluctuating within the 190–260 range in recent years, with a backward shift to 256 in 2024 and a recovery to 223 in 2025; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 14 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 24 in 2024, and 25 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 32, a significant 28% increase compared to 2025, which helps alleviate competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (cafeteria management controversy), but Douyin popularity ranks 17th (high heat), with comprehensive heat around 2.95 million, indicating still high application attention; historical admission anomaly signal is medium concern (2022 major group admission score differences), no obvious gaps; Chinese Language and Literature A+, Foreign Languages and Literature A+, Philosophy A, Law A, Sociology A, Business Administration A+, etc., top-tier humanities and social sciences, strongly attractive to History Category candidates; 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 6th on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), a top comprehensive university, extremely attractive to high-scoring History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, Law popularity is divided and wait-and-see, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, highly matching Nanjing University's History Category enrollment majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Humanities Experimental Class, etc.); in 2026, the province has approximately 326,200 History Category candidates, a significant increase of about 11.6% compared to 2025, intensifying competition; the 2025 undergraduate batch line is 464 points, slightly rising in recent years; Nanjing University is located in Jiangsu, with a stable proportion of History Category enrollment in Guangdong, cross-province application popularity remains steady.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 ranking of 223 as a medium level in recent years, the 2026 plan's significant 28% expansion, the provincial History Category candidate increase of about 11.6%, and the university's top-tier humanities and social sciences strength, the expansion's effect of pushing rankings backward and the candidate increase's effect of pushing rankings forward partially offset each other. It is predicted that the 2026 minimum ranking will slightly shift backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 270, with a range of 238–302.
